text-size.hint: setting how large the text is

size.hint: setting how large the text is, or width/height if you meant the element's dimensions

text-weight.hint: setting how bold or light the text is

boldness.hint: setting how bold or light the text is

bg.hint: setting the background color or image

round.hint: rounding the corners of an element

corner-radius.hint: rounding the corners of an element

rounded.hint: rounding the corners of an element

align.hint: aligning text, or justify-content/align-items if you're aligning flex/grid children

center.hint: centering text, use text-align: center. To center a block element itself, try margin: auto

hidden.hint: hiding an element, use display: none to remove it from layout, or visibility: hidden to keep its space

show.hint: controlling whether an element is visible in the layout

hide.hint: hiding an element, use display: none to remove it from layout

scroll.hint: controlling scrolling, use overflow: scroll or overflow: auto

spacing.hint: setting space between flex or grid children, or margin/padding if you mean outer/inner spacing of an element

gutter.hint: setting the space between flex or grid items

shadow.hint: adding a shadow to an element, or text-shadow if you meant a shadow on text

transparency.hint: setting the transparency of an element (0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque)

alpha.hint: setting the transparency of an element, use opacity, or rgba() in a color value

animate.hint: running a CSS animation, use the animation property along with a @keyframes rule

pointer.hint: changing the mouse cursor, use cursor: pointer to show the hand cursor on hover

z.hint: controlling stacking order, use z-index with a number

layer.hint: controlling which element appears on top, use z-index with a number

stack.hint: controlling which element appears on top, use z-index with a number

rows.hint: defining rows in a grid layout, use grid-template-rows

line-spacing.hint: setting the vertical space between lines of text

leading.hint: setting the vertical space between lines of text
